allow: PowerShell($json = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8088/api/chapters/2" -Method Get; Write-Output "Title: $\($json.title\)"; Write-Output "Status: $\($json.status\)"; Write-Output "analysisResult length: $\($json.analysisResult.Length\)"; Write-Output "---analysisResult---"; $json.analysisResult)

PowerShell($c = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8088/api/chapters/100" -Method Get; $analysis = $c.analysisResult | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "Chapter: $\($c.title\)"; Write-Output "Status: $\($c.status\)"; Write-Output "Has summary: $\($null -ne $analysis.summary\)"; Write-Output "Characters: $\($analysis.characters.Count\)"; Write-Output "Factions: $\($analysis.factions.Count\)"; Write-Output "Locations: $\($analysis.locations.Count\)"; Write-Output "Conflicts: $\($analysis.conflicts.Count\)"; Write-Output "Foreshadowing: $\($analysis.foreshadowing.Count\)")

PowerShell($c = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8088/api/chapters/50" -Method Get; $analysis = $c.analysisResult | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "Chapter: $\($c.title\)"; Write-Output "Status: $\($c.status\)"; Write-Output "Summary length: $\($analysis.summary.Length\)"; Write-Output "Characters: $\($analysis.characters.Count\)"; Write-Output "Factions: $\($analysis.factions.Count\)"; Write-Output "Locations: $\($analysis.locations.Count\)"; Write-Output "Conflicts: $\($analysis.conflicts.Count\)"; Write-Output "Foreshadowing: $\($analysis.foreshadowing.Count\)")

PowerShell($vols = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8088/api/volumes/by-novel/5" -Method Get; $v = $vols | Where-Object { $_.summary -ne $null } | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "Volume title: $\($v.title\)"; Write-Output "Summary length: $\($v.summary.Length\)"; Write-Output "---"; $v.summary)

PowerShell($vols = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8088/api/volumes/by-novel/5"; $v = $vols | Where-Object { $_.summary -ne $null } | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output "--- Volume title: $\($v.title\) ---"; Write-Output $v.summary)

PowerShell($outline = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8088/api/novels/5/outline"; $json = $outline | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10; Write-Output "Outline length: $\($json.Length\) chars"; Write-Output $json.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(3000, $json.Length\)\))
